# Requirements

## FR-1: Home page renders greeting

- AC-1.1: App launches without runtime errors on supported platforms.
- AC-1.2: Home page displays a greeting string from the view model.
- AC-1.3: Greeting updates when the view model state changes.

## FR-2: Theme honors system brightness

- AC-2.1: App reads system brightness on launch and selects matching theme.
- AC-2.2: Theme switches live when system brightness changes.
